source_export.delivery_boundary: controlled input folder containing immutable source files

source_grain.definition: One data row from sheet Fotos inside one content-addressed KPIONE source file version.

rejected.source_workbook_row_as_business_identity: Accepted only as traceability because row numbers change across exports and corrections.
rejected.visit_or_day_presence_as_source_grain: Rejected because KPIONE source rows are photo-level and daily presence is derived.
rejected.legacy_destination_row: Rejected because legacy state is evidence of previous runtime, not future migration authority.
rejected.latest_file_or_filename: Rejected because filename is mutable provenance and latest is not a temporal contract.

persisted_grain.raw_source_representation: Store immutable file, sheet and row provenance for every accepted photo row.
persisted_grain.normalized_event: Derived by grouping accepted photo rows by business event identity and event stability checks.
persisted_grain.daily_presence: Derived binary presence by fecha, location key and cliente_norm; never counted directly from photo rows.
persisted_grain.weekly_metrics: Derived downstream from daily presence and route/calendar contracts.

ingestion_run.does_not_represent: source content identity or business event identity

source_row.represents: one worksheet row in one source content version

photo_record.hash_algorithm: sha256 over normalized source photo content

business_event.represents: one KPIONE operational event before photo aggregation
business_event.conflict_rule: same event_id with multiple sp_item_id or event_stable_hash values blocks activation until classified as correction or source conflict

day_presence.represents: binary daily presence derived from at least one accepted business event

normalization_rules.text: trim, collapse internal whitespace, normalize Unicode, strip combining marks for identity keys, uppercase identity keys
normalization_rules.nulls: required identity fields reject or quarantine; optional fields normalize to empty string only inside fingerprints
normalization_rules.dates: parse Fecha to ISO calendar date; derive week_start as Monday of that date
normalization_rules.times: retain source time text for photo evidence; do not use time as event identity
normalization_rules.duplicate_source_rows: exact duplicate normalized photo records do not create additional active photo records

exact_rerun_same_file.rule: same source_file_sha256, sheet and row identities already accepted produce no new active rows

same_logical_file_different_filename.rule: same source_file_sha256 is the same source version; filename/source_file_id are provenance only

corrected_file_replacing_previous_delive.rule: different source_file_sha256 for the same declared coverage requires explicit supersession before active projection changes

appended_rows.rule: new source row identities insert into staging only inside a declared batch or source version

removed_rows.rule: absence in a correcting source version creates an active-projection tombstone; immutable prior rows are not deleted

partial_failed_ingestion.rule: incomplete runs remain inactive and cannot feed derived event or day-presence projections

resumed_ingestion.rule: resume may complete the same inactive run only when the semantic plan and source file versions are unchanged

duplicate_rows_inside_one_source.rule: exact duplicate photo_row_hash values keep one active normalized photo record and retain duplicate provenance/counts

same_event_multiple_source_files.rule: same event_id plus same photo_row_hash is deduped; same event_id with different event_stable_hash is quarantined as correction/conflict

concurrent_or_overlapping_runs.rule: overlapping active coverage is rejected unless it is the same semantic plan and same source file versions

correction_and_replay.source_versioning: source_file_sha256 identifies immutable content; declared batch coverage groups source versions
correction_and_replay.supersession: a correcting batch supersedes prior active projection for the declared coverage only after explicit validation
correction_and_replay.tombstone_semantics: removed rows are represented in active projection as tombstones or exclusions, never by deleting immutable source evidence
correction_and_replay.rebuild_boundary: event rows, day presence and weekly metrics rebuild from the active source-version set for the declared coverage
correction_and_replay.rollback_or_isolation: a batch can remain inactive/quarantined or be marked rolled back; child source rows remain immutable evidence

implications_for_017: 017 must build a folder-based ingestion runner around the versioned staging boundary, not cg_raw.kpione2_raw.

017 must scan a configured input folder, identify candidate photo-excel-admin_*.xlsx files, compute file SHA256 before processing, register batch and file versions, validate sheet and schema, stage photo rows immutably, activate only complete validated runs, quarantine malformed or partial files, avoid reprocessing identical content, and derive events and daily presence from active source versions.
017 input folder path must be runtime configuration, not hardcoded identity.
017 remains not authorized by this contract.

excluded_from_stable_hash.reason: task label varies by photo within same visit event
upload metadata must not affect visit identity hash

derived_fields.tipos_de_tarea: sorted distinct list of Tipo de Tarea per ID
